esis Stephen Edwards, Luciano Lavagno, Edward A. Lee, and Alberto Sangiovanni-Vincentelli Proceedings of the IEEE , Vol. 85, No. 3, March 1997 Prepublished version Published version ABSTRACT This paper addresses the design of reactive real-time embed

r addresses the design of reactive real-time embedded systems. Such systems are often heterogeneous in implementation technologies and design styles, for example by combining hardware ASICs with embedded software. The concurrent design process for su

ded software. The concurrent design process for such embedded systems involves solving the specification, validation, and synthesis problems. We review the variety of approaches to these problems that have been taken. Send comments to Edward A. Lee a
have been taken. Send comments to Edward A. Lee at eal at eecs berkeley edu .
